setting.type: Urban street and parking lot hangout near housing projects
setting.location: Nighttime Chicago city street with a lit parking lot and dilapidated multi-story apartment buildings around him and the skyline in the background

camera.motion: Smooth tracking shots, low-angle passes, slow push-ins, Dutch angles and a few dynamic handheld moments around him entering the car
camera.transitions: Match cuts, whip pans around the lowrider, and smooth crossfades between close-ups and wide shots

scene.visual_tone: Gritty but glossy, high-contrast night lighting with neon reflections on chrome and paint
